cp:coreProperties.dc:title: CBV 2.0 Vocabulary Reference — Pharma
cp:coreProperties.dc:subject: Core Business Vocabulary Reference — Pharma — UAE
cp:coreProperties.dc:creator: T&T Product Team
cp:coreProperties.dc:description: Authoritative reference for GS1 CBV 2.0 vocabulary lists used across EPCIS events: business steps, dispositions, business transaction types, source/destination types, error reason codes, sensor types, and the canonical bizStep × disposition pairing matrix.
